calibration.calibration_note: Initial V3 estimate. V3 substrate (split latent, multi-rate clock, HippocampalModule) is heavier than V2. Will be updated from actual run times.

items.title: SD-005 z_self/z_world Channel Separation Validation
items.description: Substrate validation. After 10 training episodes (E1 + E2 gradient updates), the split encoder must show z_world more selective for world_delta than z_self (world_selectivity_margin > 0.0). C1: channels not collapsed (corr < 0.8). C2: positive world selectivity margin post-training. Must PASS before any V3 claim experiments.
items.status_reason: Threshold fixed (C2: 0.0 positive margin post-training). Ready.

items.title: Full SD-003 Self-Attribution — E2+E3 Joint Pipeline
items.description: V3 redesign of EXQ-027/028 (both FAIL in V2). Tests whether the joint E2.world_forward + E3.harm_eval pipeline correctly attributes agent-caused harm. TRAINED condition: 100 warmup episodes training E2 world_forward + E3 harm_eval jointly, then counterfactual calibration eval. RANDOM condition: untrained control. PASS: TRAINED calibration_gap > 0.05 AND RANDOM |calibration_gap| < 0.10.
items.status_reason: Depends on V3-EXQ-001 PASS. New experiment targeting SD-003 root cause of EXQ-027 FAIL.
